title: 1:1 Port Audit - Gap Analysis and Fill
description: File-by-file audit of old-src/ TypeScript against Go port, filling critical gaps

stories.title: Gap Analysis - Map every TS module to Go
acceptanceCriteria: Every top-level directory in old-src/ has been audited
A gap report lists every TS module with its Go counterpart or 'MISSING'
Critical vs non-critical gaps are categorized

stories.title: Fill Critical Gaps - hooks system
acceptanceCriteria: pkg/hooks/ exists with hook execution engine matching old-src/hooks/
PreToolUse, PostToolUse, SessionStart hook events supported

stories.title: Fill Critical Gaps - constants and common utilities
acceptanceCriteria: pkg/constants/ exists with message constants, XML tags, product info matching old-src/constants/
pkg/utils/array/, pkg/utils/format/, pkg/utils/bash/ exist with core utility functions

stories.title: Fill Critical Gaps - entrypoints and QueryEngine
acceptanceCriteria: pkg/entrypoints/ exists with SDK/print/headless entrypoint types
QueryEngine in pkg/query/ handles system prompt assembly, compact triggers, and tool result budgeting

stories.title: Build and Run - End-to-End Verification
acceptanceCriteria: Binary runs with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY set and -p 'What is 2+2?' returns a valid response
Binary handles missing API key gracefully with clear error message
